seoTitle: Cleary vs Cleaverville — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cleary and Cleaverville. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cleary and Cleaverville.
heading: Cleary vs Cleaverville — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cleary, Western Australia and Cleaverville, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cleaverville has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Cleary (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cleary or Cleaverville safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cleary has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Cleaverville scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cleary scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Cleaverville scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cleary or Cleaverville?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cleaverville has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
